name: hone
description: hone is a development model where a human writes a short Plan and an automated loop then builds, verifies, consolidates, reviews, and lands each change unattended in a git worktree; a scheduled garden loop (/hone:garden) cuts staleness between changes. The repo keeps only durable truth that cannot go stale, and every cycle deletes something. Enforced by a PreToolUse guard, a Stop-hook gate and nag, two fault-finding critics, and default-on land gates for irreversible changes (authority) and real-environment proof.
